concerns.detail: Added specific company email address (api@somastacks.com) associated with a professor to de-anonymize his identity in the context of accusing him of posing as an intern.

Inserted unsupported character judgments including armchair psychological diagnosis (NPD), vague attacks on capability ('实际水平很差'), and vulgar insults describing professional networking ('把系里所有老师舔了一遍').
concerns.excerpt: 很会装的NPD，实际水平很差。据说进西湖的时候把系里所有老师舔了一遍

concerns.detail: Deleted entire substantive entry for UIUC Hua Li containing specific advising practice complaints (toxicity, PUA, internship restrictions, lab attendance policies), appearing to suppress legitimate observations rather than perform cleanup.
concerns.excerpt: UIUC Hua Li 极其toxic, 组里很多学生待了一年被劝退 要么就转租
